member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.DataStructures.Setup
member.summary: Start mode of Time Under Stress Logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.DataStructures.Setup.#ctor(Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: TUS configuration to be written to shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.DataStructures.Setup.Execute
member.summary: Sets up shared storage.
member.returns: True if storage was successfully set up. False otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod
member.summary: Prime Test method to calculate the Stress Time.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.LoggerModes
member.summary: Time Under Stress Logger modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.LoggerModes.Start
member.summary: Start of the time logger.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.LoggerModes.LoopStatus
member.summary: LoopStatus of the timer to be logged.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.LoggerModes.End
member.summary: End mode to save the last LoopStatus and ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.LoggerModes.EndAll
member.summary: EndAll mode to save the last LoopStatus and ituff. Intended to be used in alarm scenarios so does not error out when no configuration is active.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Logger modes.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.DatalogUserBin
member.summary: Gets or sets reports User Bin to be reported in the Footer Section for DPC ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.FlowItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets the flow item name to be used for getting the Loop duration for Stress time.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.StressTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the desired Stress time in seconds. Required for AutoStressDetect mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.MaxFlowLoopTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time in seconds for flowLoopDuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.VoltageSupplies
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of voltage supplies to monitor for stress.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.SamplingInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets reports sampling interval in milliseconds for stress monitoring.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.VoltageThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets reports voltage threshold for pin to be considered 'Under Stress'.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.FlushTimeSpan
member.summary: Gets or sets the Flush time span, to execute FLUSH api call.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.CustomDffToken
member.summary: Gets or sets Custom DFF token to save the stress time accordingly.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.TemporaryTokensToPrint
member.summary: Gets or sets list of additional DffTokens to print to the temporary ituff logs generated during loop status execute. Must be provided during start mode to take effect.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.PrimeTimeUnderStressControlTestMethod.DieName
member.summary: Gets or sets Die name to save the stress time accordingly.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens
member.summary: Constants to be used in the entire TimeUnderStress logger project.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.TimeOfLastFlush
member.summary: Gets or sets the last time when ituff flush was called.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.TusStartingStressItuffTag
member.summary: TusStartingStressItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusStandardStimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusStandardStimeItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusStandardSummaryItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusStandardSummaryItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusAutoStimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoStimeItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusAutoXtimeItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoXtimeItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusAutoSummaryItuffTag
member.summary: LoopStatusAutoSummaryItuffTag.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.TusConfigurationKey
member.summary: Prefix for the TUS configuration object in shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.TimeDiffStartAndLastSnapshot
member.summary: Key name to hold Time Difference from start to last snapshot.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.StressTimeLogUserVar
member.summary: UserVar name to store Stress time.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.StressTimePerDieSavedForLoopStatus
member.summary: Shared Storage token name to store Stress time per die.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusAboveLimitPort
member.summary: Port for flow loop being above the given limit (to avoid infinite looping).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusExitPort
member.summary: Port for flow loop exit.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TimeUnderStressTokens.LoopStatusContinuePort
member.summary: Port for flow loop continuing.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.AutoStressDetectStart
member.summary: AutoStressDetectStart mode of Time Under Stress Logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.AutoStressDetectStart.#ctor(System.Boolean,Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode
member.summary: Base mode class to hold different modes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.Execute
member.summary: virtual execute function to be defined at class construction.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.WriteStrgvalToDatalog(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the strgval format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.WriteComntToDatalog(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an int value to datalog using the comnt format with the given postfix.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode.WriteComntToDatalog(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a value to datalog using the comnt format with the given postfix.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.End
member.summary: Time Under Stress in a End mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.End.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.EndAll
member.summary: Time Under Stress in a End mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.EndAll.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.LoopStatus
member.summary: LoopStatus mode for Time Under Stress logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.LoopStatus.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.ProcessEnd.SetStressTimeInDff(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stores elapsed stress time in DFF.
member.param: The stress time to be reported to DFF.
The custom DFF token to be updated with stress time.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.ProcessEnd.SetStressTimePerDieInSharedStorage(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stores elapsed stress time per die in Shared Storage.
member.param: The stress time to be saved to Shared Storage.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.StandardModeStart
member.summary: StandardModeStart mode of Time Under Stress Logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.StandardModeStart.#ctor(Prime.TimeUnderStressService.DataStructures.Configuration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.Start
member.summary: Start mode of Time Under Stress Logger.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.Start.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.DataStructures.Setup,Prime.TestMethods.TimeUnderStressControl.TUSModes.BaseMode,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
